creator: spam@rm-rf.kiev.ua
text:
On Tue, Nov 09, 2010 at 03:33:01AM +0000, obrien@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: [patch] editors/vim remove gettext autodetection, respect WITHOUT_NLS instead
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: obrien
> State-Changed-When: Tue Nov 9 02:31:26 UTC 2010
> State-Changed-Why: 
> This patch doesn't seem to work:
> 
> $ make clean
> $ make -DWITHOUT_NLS
> [..]
> $ ldd work/vim73/src/vim | grep libintl.so
>         libintl.so.9 => /usr/local/lib/libintl.so.9 (0x28f15000)
You need to place knob in /etc/make.conf, e.g.

$echo WITHOUT_NLS=yes >> /etc/make.conf
$sudo make -C /usr/ports/editors/vim
$ldd /usr/local/bin/vim
/usr/local/bin/vim:
		libm.so.5 => /lib/libm.so.5 (0x481e7000)
		libncurses.so.8 => /lib/libncurses.so.8 (0x48200000)
		libc.so.7 => /lib/libc.so.7 (0x48247000)
		libiconv.so.3 => /usr/local/lib/libiconv.so.3 (0x48350000)


--
Adios
